TRIAL MOTION CALENDAR ON MAR-02-2005 IN 206, PLAINTIFF'S MTN FOR PREFERENCE IN SETTING CASE FOR TRIAL PURSUANT TO CCP 36(D) WAS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF STATED THAT THIS CASE IS AT-ISSUE ON THE RECORD. THE TRIAL DATE IS SET FOR 5/31/05 @ 11:15AM IN DEPT. 206; SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR 5/20/05 @ 9:30AM IN DEPT. 304. DISCOVERY IS OPEN UNTIL THE CASE IS ASSIGNED TO A TRIAL COURT. PARTIES STIPULATE TO G.O. 140 RE: MOTIONS FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. TRIAL SETTING IS CONDITIONAL UPON THE PLAINTIFF AND SPOUSE'S DEPOSITION BEING COMPLETED BY 3/21/05. ADDITIONAL MEDICAL INFORMATION TO BE PROVIDED WITHIN 30 DAYS. ORDER SIGNED. HON. ROBERT L. DONDERO; CLERKS: V. MU/D. OKAZAKI REPORTER: JOANN BRYCE, #3321 (206)
